# @zakkster/lite-headless / tag

Display tag (status pill). Distinct from `tag-input` (which is the
multi-value input that produces tag-like chips). This is a single
status display element with intent colors + optional close button.

## Quick example

```js
import { createTag } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/tag";

const tag = createTag({
    intent: "success",        // default | primary | success | info | warning | danger
    closable: true,
    onClose: (reason) => {},
});

tag.attachRoot(tagEl);
tag.attachCloseButton(xBtn);
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `intent` | `"default"` | One of: `default`, `primary`, `success`, `info`, `warning`, `danger` |
| `closable` | `false` | Adds close-button wiring + paints `data-closable` |
| `onClose` | - | `(reason: string) => void` |

## API

```ts
{
    intent(): string
    isRemoved(): boolean
    closable: boolean    // readonly

    setIntent(v: string): void
    close(reason?: string): void
    reset(): void

    attachRoot(el): off
    attachCloseButton(el): off

    destroy(): void
}
```

## Painted attributes

### Root (`[data-tag-root]`)

- `data-intent="default|primary|success|info|warning|danger"`
- `data-closable` — boolean, when closable
- `data-hidden` — boolean, after close
- `hidden` — after close (for SR + non-CSS)

### Close button (`[data-tag-close]`)

- `aria-label="Remove tag"` — only if not pre-set

## Wrapper (`<lite-tag>`)

```html
<lite-tag intent="success">Shipped</lite-tag>

<lite-tag intent="warning" closable>
    Pending review
    <button data-tag-close>×</button>
</lite-tag>
```

Attributes:
- `intent` — string; reactive
- `closable` — boolean

Host methods: `setIntent(v)`, `close()`, `reset()`.
Event: `close` — `{ detail: { reason } }`.

## CSS contract

`data-intent` is a Class-3 enum. Consumer paints intent colors via
`[data-tag-root][data-intent="success"] { background: ...; color: ...; }`.
